name: freecodereorganizer
description: Reorganize C# class members alphabetically and restore the wrapped-parameter ){ brace style — a single file or the whole workspace. Shares the same engine as the Visual Studio extension.

freecodereorganizer.sortAlphabetically.description: Sort members alphabetically within each kind group (properties, indexers and methods interleave into one alphabetical list).

freecodereorganizer.ignoreLeadingUndersc.description: When comparing names, ignore a single leading underscore so _connectionString sorts as "connectionString".

freecodereorganizer.groupByVisibility.description: Group members by accessibility (public first) before sorting. Off by default — FreeCRM interleaves public/private in pure alphabetical order.

freecodereorganizer.staticMembersFirst.description: Within a kind group, place static members before instance members. Off by default to match FreeCRM.

freecodereorganizer.collapseWrappedParam.description: When a parameter list is wrapped across multiple lines, glue the closing ) and the body's opening { together as "){" on one line — the FreeCRM author's hand style.

freecodereorganizer.maxPercentReordered.description: If sorting would move more than this percent of a type's sortable members, the type is treated as deliberately ordered by purpose and left untouched. Set 100 to always sort.

freecodereorganizer.runFormatFirst.description: Before reorganizing the active document, run VS Code's Format Document (editorconfig-aware). Requires a C# formatter (C# Dev Kit or OmniSharp).

freecodereorganizer.runDotnetFormatOnWor.description: Before reorganizing the whole workspace, run Microsoft's 'dotnet format' (editorconfig cleanup) on each folder. Requires the .NET SDK and a solution/project in the folder.

freecodereorganizer.dotnetPath.description: Path to the 'dotnet' executable used to run the reorganize engine. Change only if dotnet is not on your PATH.
